# Stellar Atlas тАФ Configuration Reference

This file is **generated** from the struct tags in
`internal/config/config.go` and regenerated by the
`docs-config` subcommand of `stellaratlas-ops`.

To add / rename / remove a config option:

1. Edit `internal/config/config.go` (struct field + tags).
2. `make docs-config` (regenerates this file).
3. Commit both in the same PR.

Operators hand-edit a TOML file that maps onto this schema.
Secrets never live in the TOML file itself тАФ reference them via
the `env:` column.

## Top-level sections


### `[region]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `region.id` | `string` | `r1` | тАФ | Short region identifier, lowercase (r1/r2/r3). |
| `region.name` | `string` | `London` | тАФ | Human-readable region name (London, Ashburn, тАж). |
| `region.home_domain` | `string` | `stellaratlas.xyz` | тАФ | DNS home domain for this org (used in stellar.toml + SCP quorum sub-quorum). |

### `[stellar]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `stellar.network` | `string` | `pubnet` | тАФ | Network passphrase name тАФ pubnet / testnet / futurenet. |
| `stellar.core_http_endpoint` | `string` | `http://127.0.0.1:11626` | тАФ | stellar-core admin HTTP (used for liveness). |
| `stellar.rpc_endpoints` | `[]string` | `["http://127.0.0.1:8000"]` | тАФ | stellar-rpc endpoints for getEvents/getLedgers. Tried in order on failover. |
| `stellar.history_archive_url` | `string` | `https://history.stellar.org/prd/core-live/core_live_001` | тАФ | Public history archive (SDF or ours) for backfill catchup. |

### `[storage]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `storage.postgres_dsn` | `string` | `postgres://stellaratlas@127.0.0.1:5432/stellaratlas?sslmode=disable` | `STELLARATLAS_POSTGRES_DSN` | Postgres DSN; password resolved via env: prefix. |
| `storage.redis_addr` | `string` | `127.0.0.1:6379` | тАФ | Redis master address host:port. Used when redis_sentinel_addrs is empty (single-node / direct mode). When sentinel addrs are set, this is ignored. |
| `storage.redis_sentinel_addrs` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | List of Sentinel host:port addresses. Non-empty enables FailoverClient mode (production HA per ADR-0024); empty falls back to single-node redis_addr. |
| `storage.redis_master_name` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Sentinel master name as set in inventory (e.g. stellaratlas-r1-cache). Required when redis_sentinel_addrs is non-empty. |
| `storage.redis_password_env` | `string` | _(required)_ | `STELLARATLAS_REDIS_PASSWORD` | Env var holding the Redis password (reference, not the password itself). Used as both requirepass (client auth) and SentinelPassword (sentinel auth) тАФ they're the same secret per the role. |
| `storage.redis_username` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Optional Redis ACL username. Empty (default) AUTHs as Redis's legacy 'default' user тАФ same wire shape as redis_password alone. Set to 'stellaratlas' (or the operator's per-component user) when redis_acl_lockdown is enabled in the ansible role (F-1213 audit-2026-05-12); without a username the broker-side ACL rejects the connection. |
| `storage.s3_endpoint` | `string` | `http://127.0.0.1:9000` | тАФ | S3-compatible object-store endpoint (MinIO / AWS S3). |
| `storage.s3_region` | `string` | `r1` | тАФ | S3 region label (free-form for MinIO; AWS region name otherwise). |
| `storage.s3_bucket_archive` | `string` | `galexie-archive` | тАФ | Immutable history-archive bucket name. |
| `storage.s3_bucket_live` | `string` | `galexie-live` | тАФ | Live Galexie export bucket name. |
| `storage.s3_access_key_env` | `string` | `STELLARATLAS_S3_ACCESS_KEY` | `STELLARATLAS_S3_ACCESS_KEY` | Env var holding S3 access key ID. |
| `storage.s3_secret_key_env` | `string` | `STELLARATLAS_S3_SECRET_KEY` | `STELLARATLAS_S3_SECRET_KEY` | Env var holding S3 secret access key. |
| `storage.s3_cold_endpoint` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Cold-tier S3 endpoint. Empty disables tiering. Production: https://s3.amazonaws.com |
| `storage.s3_cold_region` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Cold-tier S3 region. Production (aws-public-blockchain): us-east-1 |
| `storage.s3_cold_bucket_archive` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Cold-tier bucket + prefix for historical LCMs. Empty disables tiering. Production: aws-public-blockchain/v1.1/stellar/ledgers/pubnet |
| `storage.s3_cold_access_key_env` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Env var holding cold-tier S3 access key. Empty = anonymous reads (correct for public buckets). |
| `storage.s3_cold_secret_key_env` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Env var holding cold-tier S3 secret key. Empty = anonymous reads. |
| `storage.clickhouse_addr` | `string` | `127.0.0.1:9300` | тАФ | ClickHouse native address host:port for the Tier-1 lake (ADR-0034); used by the indexer real-time dual-sink. |
| `storage.clickhouse_live_sink` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Enable the real-time ClickHouse dual-sink: the indexer writes each ledger's structural extract to CH inline (non-blocking), keeping the lake within ~seconds of the chain. Off by default. |
| `storage.clickhouse_projector_source` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Feed-switch: the projector reads forward events from the ClickHouse lake (contract_events) instead of Postgres soroban_events, enabling soroban_events decommission. Requires clickhouse_live_sink. Off by default. |

### `[ingestion]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `ingestion.enabled_sources` | `[]string` | `["soroswap","aquarius","phoenix"]` | тАФ | List of source connector names to run on this indexer replica. See config.KnownSources for valid values. |
| `ingestion.backfill_from_ledger` | `uint32` | `0` | тАФ | Earliest ledger to backfill from; 0 = continue-from-persisted-cursor. |
| `ingestion.backfill_batch_size` | `uint32` | `64` | тАФ | Ledgers per backfill fetch batch. |
| `ingestion.cursor_store_scheme` | `string` | `postgres` | тАФ | Where per-source cursors live тАФ postgres / redis. |
| `ingestion.live_seam_ledger` | `uint32` | `0` | тАФ | First ledger in the live bucket. Below this, indexer reads from galexie-archive. 0 disables the archive bucket entirely. |
| `ingestion.projector.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Master switch. When false the projector goroutines are not started. |
| `ingestion.projector.persist_per_source` | `bool` | `true` | тАФ | When false (Phase 4+), the dispatcher's events-goroutine skips Soroban-derived events so the projector is sole writer. Requires Enabled=true. Defaults true (Phase 3 parallel mode); operator flips to false once projector lag is verified low. |

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |

| `oracle.reflector.dex_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Reflector DEX contract (C-prefix) on mainnet. |
| `oracle.reflector.cex_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Reflector CEX contract (C-prefix) on mainnet. |
| `oracle.reflector.fx_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Reflector FX contract (C-prefix) on mainnet. |
| `oracle.redstone.adapter_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | RedStone Adapter contract (C-prefix) on mainnet тАФ CA526Y2NQWGWVVQ7RFFPGAZMU66PSYJ3UC2MTVAV4ZU7OM5BOPHDXUSG. |
| `oracle.band.standard_reference_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Band Protocol StandardReference contract (C-prefix) on mainnet тАФ CCQXWMZVM3KRTXTUPTN53YHL272QGKF32L7XEDNZ2S6OSUFK3NFBGG5M. |
| `oracle.soroswap.factory_contract` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Soroswap factory contract (C-prefix) on mainnet тАФ CA4HEQTL2WPEUYKYKCDOHCDNIV4QHNJ7EL4J4NQ6VADP7SYHVRYZ7AW2. |
| `oracle.soroswap.seed_rpc_endpoint` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | stellar-rpc URL used for the boot-time factory sweep. Any public pubnet endpoint works (e.g. https://mainnet.sorobanrpc.com). Falls back to stellar.rpc_endpoints[0] when empty. |

### `[external]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `external.binance.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default тАФ no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.binance.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the connector's built-in default poll cadence (e.g. "120s"). Empty/zero uses the connector default. |
| `external.kraken.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default тАФ no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.kraken.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the connector's built-in default poll cadence (e.g. "120s"). Empty/zero uses the connector default. |
| `external.bitstamp.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default тАФ no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.bitstamp.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the connector's built-in default poll cadence (e.g. "120s"). Empty/zero uses the connector default. |
| `external.coinbase.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default тАФ no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.coinbase.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the connector's built-in default poll cadence (e.g. "120s"). Empty/zero uses the connector default. |
| `external.exchangeratesapi.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.exchangeratesapi.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `EXCHANGERATESAPI_KEY` | ExchangeRatesApi access key. Prefer env var; TOML fallback exists for local-dev convenience. |
| `external.exchangeratesapi.base` | `string` | `USD` | тАФ | Base currency (USD, EUR, GBP, тАж). Defaults to USD. Free tier locked to EUR; paid tier accepts any allow-listed fiat. |
| `external.polygon_forex.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.polygon_forex.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `POLYGON_API_KEY` | Polygon.io API key. Prefer env var POLYGON_API_KEY; TOML fallback for local-dev only. |
| `external.polygon_forex.base` | `string` | `USD` | тАФ | Base currency filter. Only tickers matching C:<base><quote> emit. Defaults to USD. |
| `external.coingecko.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default тАФ no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.coingecko.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the connector's built-in default poll cadence (e.g. "120s"). Empty/zero uses the connector default. |
| `external.coinmarketcap.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.coinmarketcap.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `COINMARKETCAP_API_KEY` | CMC Pro API key, passed as X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY header. Prefer env var. |
| `external.cryptocompare.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default. |
| `external.cryptocompare.api_key` | `string` | _(required)_ | `CRYPTOCOMPARE_API_KEY` | CryptoCompare API key, passed as 'Authorization: Apikey <KEY>'. Prefer env var. |
| `external.ecb.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether this connector runs. Off by default тАФ no network egress until operator opts in. |
| `external.ecb.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the connector's built-in default poll cadence (e.g. "120s"). Empty/zero uses the connector default. |
| `external.chainlink.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether the Chainlink ingest poller runs. Off by default. |
| `external.chainlink.rpc_url` | `string` | _(required)_ | `CHAINLINK_RPC_URL` | Ethereum mainnet JSON-RPC endpoint (Alchemy / Infura / public). For Alchemy this includes the API key in the URL path (.../v2/<KEY>) тАФ treat the whole value as a secret. Prefer env var. |
| `external.chainlink.poll_interval` | `int64` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Override the default 30s poll cadence. Empty/zero uses the package default. |
| `external.chainlink.feed_map` | `map[string]ChainlinkFeedSetting` | `{}` | тАФ | Maps canonical pair string ('crypto:BTC/fiat:USD' etc.) to the AggregatorV3 contract address + decimals + invert. Empty falls back to the built-in default covering BTC/ETH/LINK/EUR/GBP/JPY vs USD. |
| `external.chainlink.feed_map.<key>.address` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | 0x-prefixed AggregatorV3 contract address on Ethereum mainnet. |
| `external.chainlink.feed_map.<key>.decimals` | `uint8` | `8` | тАФ | Power-of-10 divisor for the raw int256 answer. Defaults to 8 (Chainlink's standard). Operator sets per-feed only when the feed publishes at a non-standard scale. |
| `external.chainlink.feed_map.<key>.invert` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | If true, the canonical pair is the reciprocal of the feed's natural quote тАФ e.g. operator wants USD/EUR but the feed publishes EUR/USD. price тЖТ 1/price after scaling. |

### `[aggregate]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `aggregate.vwap_window_seconds` | `int` | `300` | тАФ | Rolling VWAP window in seconds. |
| `aggregate.twap_window_seconds` | `int` | `300` | тАФ | Rolling TWAP window in seconds (fallback when volume below threshold). |
| `aggregate.min_usd_volume` | `float64` | `10000` | тАФ | Per-pair minimum USD volume within the window for VWAP eligibility. |
| `aggregate.outlier_sigma_threshold` | `float64` | `4` | тАФ | Reject trades priced > N sigma from the rolling median before VWAP. |
| `aggregate.triangulation_enabled` | `bool` | `true` | тАФ | Master switch for the post-refresh triangulation pass. When true (default), the aggregator runs each aggregate.triangulations chain ├Ч window after the per-pair refresh, multiplying the leg VWAPs and writing the implied target price. When false, the pass is skipped entirely regardless of aggregate.triangulations entries тАФ an operator-side kill-switch for the triangulation feature without having to clear the chain table. |
| `aggregate.interval_seconds` | `int` | `30` | тАФ | Tick cadence тАФ gap between successive (pair, window) refresh passes. 0 falls back to the library default (30s). |
| `aggregate.divergence_min_interval_seconds` | `int` | `300` | тАФ | Minimum wall-clock seconds between divergence-refresh passes. Tick still fires at interval_seconds, but the divergence pass is skipped if elapsed < this value. Default 300s (= cachekeys.DivergenceTTL) keeps the API's div:<asset> cache continuously populated while burning ~10├Ч less of the CMC monthly-quota (F-0030 follow-up). Set to 0 to refresh every tick (legacy). |
| `aggregate.max_trades_per_window` | `int` | `10000` | тАФ | Per-(pair, window) cap on TradesInRange row count to bound a runaway scan. 0 falls back to the library default (10000). |
| `aggregate.disable_class_filter` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Disable the default ClassExchange-only VWAP filter so every fetched trade contributes regardless of source class. Off by default тАФ see internal/sources/external/registry.go for class semantics. |
| `aggregate.enable_stablecoin_fiat_proxy` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Expand fiat-denominated target pairs to include stablecoin backers (XLM/fiat:USD also pulls XLM/USDT/USDC/DAI/PYUSD/USDP and collapses onto the target). Off by default тАФ N+1 TradesInRange calls per (pair, window). |
| `aggregate.pairs` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Aggregator coverage set as canonical pair strings ("crypto:XLM/fiat:USD", "native/USDC-GтАж"). Empty leaves the binary's built-in default (XLM/BTC/ETH ├Ч USD/EUR/GBP). Each entry is parsed via canonical.ParseAsset on both sides; an unparseable entry fails Validate. |
| `aggregate.windows` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Per-window cadences as Go time.Duration strings ("5m", "1h", "24h"). Empty leaves the orchestrator's built-in default ([5m, 1h, 24h]). |
| `aggregate.triangulations` | `[]struct` | `[]` | тАФ | Operator-configured chain pricing entries тАФ each row defines a target pair plus an ordered chain of leg pairs. After the per-pair refresh runs, the orchestrator multiplies each leg's freshly-cached VWAP via aggregate.TriangulateChain and writes the implied target VWAP to its own cache key. Empty (default) skips triangulation entirely. |
| `aggregate.triangulations[].target` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Implied target pair (canonical wire form). |
| `aggregate.triangulations[].legs` | `[]string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Ordered chain of leg pairs; product yields the target price. Must have at least 2 entries and adjacent legs must share their pivot asset. |

### `[anomaly]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `anomaly.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Master switch. When false, anomaly checks are disabled and every bucket is published as-is. Flip to true after operator has classified the asset set. |
| `anomaly.thresholds` | `map[string]AnomalyThreshold` | `{}` | тАФ | Per-class threshold table. Keys are asset class names (stablecoin/treasury/crypto/governance/default). Empty falls back to package defaults; partial maps merge over defaults. The default row is required (loader fills it from package defaults if absent). |
| `anomaly.thresholds.<key>.warn_pct` | `float64` | `30.0` | тАФ | Deviation above this percentage triggers ActionWarn (publish with divergence_warning flag). |
| `anomaly.thresholds.<key>.freeze_pct` | `float64` | `75.0` | тАФ | Deviation above this percentage triggers ActionFreeze when source_count<=1 (don't publish; serve last-known-good). |
| `anomaly.classifications` | `map` | `{}` | тАФ | Operator-curated map of canonical asset_id тЖТ asset class (stablecoin/treasury/crypto/governance). Anything absent falls through to the default class. |
| `anomaly.phase2.confidence_max_freeze` | `float64` | `0.10` | тАФ | Freeze fires when confidence is strictly less than this. ADR-0019 default 0.10. |
| `anomaly.phase2.z_score_min_freeze` | `float64` | `5.0` | тАФ | Freeze fires when z-score is strictly greater than this. ADR-0019 default 5.0 (the documented 5╧Г trigger). |
| `anomaly.phase2.source_count_max_freeze` | `int` | `1` | тАФ | Freeze fires when source count is at or below this. ADR-0019 default 1 (single-source pattern). |

### `[api]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `api.listen_addr` | `string` | `0.0.0.0:3000` | тАФ | Bind address for the HTTP server. |
| `api.external_base_url` | `string` | `https://api.stellaratlas.xyz/v1` | тАФ | Public-facing base URL (e.g. https://api.stellaratlas.xyz/v1). |
| `api.tls_cert_probe_hosts` | `[]string` | `["api.stellaratlas.xyz","status.stellaratlas.xyz","stellaratlas.xyz"]` | тАФ | Public hostnames whose TLS leaf cert NotAfter the API binary should periodically probe and surface as stellaratlas_tls_cert_not_after_unix{host}. Each entry may include :port; bare hostnames default to :443. The probe goroutine ticks every 6h. F-0051 (audit-2026-05-26): Caddy auto-renews Let's Encrypt 30d before expiry but silent renewal failures (DNS, rate limit, ACME quota) would otherwise only surface at cert expiry. Empty list disables the probe. |
| `api.auth_mode` | `string` | `none` | тАФ | Authentication mode тАФ none / apikey / apikey_optional / sep10. 'none' attaches anonymous Subject to every request. 'apikey' requires Authorization: Bearer <key> on every request; missing тЖТ 401. 'apikey_optional' is the freemium shape тАФ anonymous floor (60/min) without a key, per-key tier (1000/min default) with a valid key, invalid key тЖТ 401. 'sep10' requires a SEP-10 JWT. The API binary wires real validators when the required dependencies are present; deployments that opt into auth without satisfying those fail loud rather than silently demoting to anonymous. |
| `api.auth_backend` | `string` | `redis` | тАФ | Backing store for API-key validation. 'redis' (default) uses the legacy apikey:<hash> JSON records minted by /v1/signup. 'postgres' uses the platform.api_keys table (the dashboard's source of truth) with Redis as a read-through cache тАФ required for keys minted from the dashboard to authenticate against the runtime API. Cutover knob: deployments running both /v1/signup keys and dashboard-minted keys should use 'postgres' (the validator falls back to Postgres on Redis cache miss + writes back, so existing legacy keys keep working transparently). |
| `api.anon_rate_limit_per_min` | `int` | `60` | тАФ | Per-IP rate limit for anonymous requests. |
| `api.key_rate_limit_per_min` | `int` | `1000` | тАФ | Per-API-key rate limit, default tier. |
| `api.signup_require_email_verification` | `bool` | `true` | тАФ | F-1218: when true, /v1/signup-minted API keys must complete email-ownership-proof (clicking the link emailed at signup) before they can authenticate. Default true (2026-05-13): we are still pre-launch with no consumer traffic, so the safe default is to require verification тАФ operators who want to allow unverified signup must opt in explicitly. Pre-launch default-flip narrows the launch-blocker surface; F-1218 closure required this. |
| `api.cdn_enabled` | `bool` | `true` | тАФ | Emit CDN-friendly Cache-Control headers on long-immutable endpoints. |
| `api.allowed_origins` | `[]string` | `["*"]` | тАФ | CORS allow-list for browser clients. |
| `api.allow_credentials` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Emit Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true on CORS responses to allowed origins. Required for cookie-bearing cross-origin requests (magic-link session on /v1/account/me, /v1/account/keys). Browser-incompatible with allowed_origins=["*"]; the API panics at boot if both are set. |
| `api.trusted_proxy_cidrs` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Immediate peer CIDR allow-list that is permitted to supply X-Forwarded-For. Empty means the API ignores that header and uses the socket peer address for logging, anonymous identity, and IP-based rate limiting. |
| `api.sep10.seed_env` | `string` | `STELLARATLAS_SEP10_SEED` | тАФ | Environment variable holding the server signing keypair S-strkey. Operators rotate this on a schedule; ansible-vault stores the actual value. |
| `api.sep10.jwt_secret_env` | `string` | `STELLARATLAS_SEP10_JWT_SECRET` | тАФ | Environment variable holding the HMAC-SHA256 JWT secret (тЙе 32 bytes of entropy required). |
| `api.sep10.web_auth_domain` | `string` | `api.stellaratlas.xyz` | тАФ | SEP-10 web_auth_domain тАФ the host that serves /v1/auth/sep10/*. Carried inside the challenge tx so clients verify before signing. Typically the API's external host (e.g. api.stellaratlas.xyz). |
| `api.sep10.home_domain` | `string` | `stellaratlas.xyz` | тАФ | Issuer home_domain. Carried in the JWT iss claim and in the challenge's first manage_data op. Typically same as the project root domain. |
| `api.sep10.challenge_ttl` | `int64` | `15m` | тАФ | How long a SEP-10 challenge is valid for signing. SDK requires тЙе 1s; SEP-10 spec recommends 15m. |
| `api.sep10.jwt_ttl` | `int64` | `1h` | тАФ | Lifetime of an issued JWT. Clients refresh by repeating the challenge тЖТ verify flow. |
| `api.streaming.pairs` | `[][]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Operator-declared closed-bucket fanout pair list. Each entry is a two-element [base, quote] array of canonical asset strings (e.g. [["native", "fiat:USD"], ["credit:USDC:GA5ZтАж", "fiat:USD"]]). Empty disables the producer; clients that connect see SSE open + heartbeats but no price_update events. |
| `api.streaming.poll_interval` | `int64` | `5s` | тАФ | Per-pair poll cadence for the closed-bucket producer. Default 5s; clamped to 1s minimum. |
| `api.stripe.signing_secret` | `string` | _(required)_ | `STELLARATLAS_STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` | Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_тАж). Empty disables the endpoint. |
| `api.prometheus_url` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Prometheus HTTP API root (e.g. http://localhost:9090) backing /v1/status. Empty leaves /v1/status serving an in-process surface (uptime + region only). |
| `api.dashboard.base_url` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Absolute URL of the customer dashboard SPA (e.g. https://app.stellaratlas.xyz). The magic-link callback URL embedded in emails is {base_url}/auth/callback?token=<plaintext>. |
| `api.dashboard.email_from` | `string` | `Stellar Atlas <hello@stellaratlas.xyz>` | тАФ | From: address for transactional emails (e.g. 'Stellar Atlas <hello@stellaratlas.xyz>'). Must match a domain Resend has verified for the configured API key. |
| `api.dashboard.resend_api_key_env` | `string` | `STELLARATLAS_RESEND_API_KEY` | тАФ | Environment variable holding the Resend transactional-email API key (re_тАж). Empty value leaves the dashboard auth flow on a NoopSender тАФ magic-link tokens land in the API logs only, useful for local dev. Production sets this. |
| `api.dashboard.magic_link_ttl_minutes` | `int` | `15` | тАФ | Magic-link validity in minutes. Default 15 тАФ long enough for an email to arrive + the user to switch contexts; short enough to limit replay-window if a phone is briefly unattended. |
| `api.dashboard.session_ttl_days` | `int` | `30` | тАФ | Session-cookie lifetime in days. Default 30 тАФ matches typical SaaS dashboards; users sign in monthly without re-authing. |
| `api.dashboard.cookie_secure` | `bool` | `true` | тАФ | Set the Secure flag on the session cookie. Production = true; dev (http://localhost) = false. |
| `api.dashboard.cookie_domain` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Cookie Domain attribute. Empty (default) means a host-only cookie scoped to the API host. Set to '.stellaratlas.xyz' if a future surface needs the cookie shared across subdomains. |

### `[metadata]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `metadata.issuer_home_domains` | `map` | `{}` | тАФ | Static curated map of issuer-account G-strkey тЖТ home-domain. Layered behind the live LCM-derived resolver as a fallback for issuers whose AccountEntry hasn't been observed yet (or whose on-chain home_domain field is empty). |

### `[supply]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `supply.sdf_reserve_accounts` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | G-strkey list of SDF-controlled reserve accounts whose XLM balances are excluded from circulating supply per ADR-0011 Algorithm 1. |
| `supply.reserve_balances_stroops` | `map` | `{}` | тАФ | Operator-managed snapshot of each SDF reserve account's XLM balance in stroops (decimal string). Updated manually on SDF reserve-move announcements. Used as the fallback source when the LCM AccountEntry observer (Task #54) hasn't yet populated account_observations for the watched reserve set; the live observer takes over once those rows land. |
| `supply.aggregator_refresh_enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Run the supply-snapshot writer as a goroutine in the aggregator instead of via the systemd timer. Requires the LCM AccountEntry observer to be backfilled across the watched accounts (or the static reserve_balances_stroops fallback to be valid). |
| `supply.aggregator_refresh_cadence` | `int64` | `5m` | тАФ | Per-cycle interval for the in-aggregator supply-snapshot worker (only used when aggregator_refresh_enabled is true). |
| `supply.watched_classic_assets` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Operator-curated classic credit assets (CODE-ISSUER form) to track for Algorithm 2 supply per ADR-0022. Empty leaves the classic-supply pipeline off. |
| `supply.sac_wrappers` | `map` | `{}` | тАФ | SAC wrapper contract C-strkey тЖТ supply.AssetKey (CODE:ISSUER) map. Drives the SAC balance observer's watched-contract filter. Pure SEP-41 contracts reuse this map by mapping contract_id тЖТ contract_id. |
| `supply.watched_sep41_contracts` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Operator-curated SEP-41 Soroban contract C-strkeys to track for Algorithm 3 supply per ADR-0023. Empty leaves the SEP-41 supply pipeline off. |
| `supply.strict_freshness_required` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | F-1236: when true, supply snapshots without a MinComponentLedger anchor (i.e. zero-value freshness, the static-XLM fallback or a transiently-failing producer) are rejected rather than published. Default false preserves backwards-compatible permissive behaviour; flip true after the freshness producers are confirmed wired in steady state. |
| `supply.stale_component_ledgers_by_asset` | `map` | `{}` | тАФ | Per-asset override of the F-1236 stale-component-ledger threshold. Map keys are asset_key (CODE-ISSUER for classic, bare contract id for SEP-41); values are ledger counts. Empty map (default) keeps every asset on the global 1000-ledger threshold. F-0040 (audit-2026-05-26). |

### `[trades]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `trades.usd_pegged_classic_assets` | `[]string` | `[]` | тАФ | Classic credit asset_keys (CODE-ISSUER) the operator declares as USD-pegged stablecoins. On-chain DEX trades quoted in these (or their SAC wrappers, transitive via [supply.sac_wrappers]) populate trades.usd_volume at insert time. Empty preserves the off-chain-only default. |

### `[divergence]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `divergence.threshold_pct` | `float64` | `5.0` | тАФ | Divergence percentage above which the warning flag fires. |
| `divergence.min_sources_for_warning` | `int` | `2` | тАФ | Minimum successful references before warning_fired can be true. |
| `divergence.per_reference_timeout_seconds` | `int` | `5` | тАФ | Bound for each reference call. Default 5. |
| `divergence.coingecko.enabled` | `bool` | `true` | тАФ | Whether the CoinGecko reference is wired into the divergence service. |
| `divergence.coingecko.base_url` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | CoinGecko API base URL. Empty defaults to https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3. |
| `divergence.coingecko.id_map` | `map` | `{}` | тАФ | Maps canonical asset_id тЖТ CoinGecko slug. Operator-curated; empty falls back to the built-in default covering XLM + major stables. |
| `divergence.chainlink.enabled` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Whether the Chainlink reference is wired into the divergence service. |
| `divergence.chainlink.rpc_url` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | Ethereum JSON-RPC endpoint. Empty defaults to https://cloudflare-eth.com. |
| `divergence.chainlink.feeds` | `map[string]ChainlinkFeedConfig` | `{}` | тАФ | Maps pair strings to {address, decimals, invert}. Empty disables Chainlink in practice. |
| `divergence.chainlink.feeds.<key>.address` | `string` | _(required)_ | тАФ | 0x-prefixed mainnet feed contract address. |
| `divergence.chainlink.feeds.<key>.decimals` | `int` | `8` | тАФ | Power-of-10 divisor for the raw int256. Defaults to 8 (Chainlink standard). |
| `divergence.chainlink.feeds.<key>.invert` | `bool` | `false` | тАФ | Set true when canonical pair is reciprocal of the feed's natural quote. |

### `[obs]`

| Key | Type | Default | Env override | Description |
| --- | ---- | ------- | ------------ | ----------- |
| `obs.metrics_listen` | `string` | `127.0.0.1:9464` | тАФ | Bind address for the dedicated /metrics Prometheus endpoint. Read by the indexer, the aggregator, and the long-lived ops binaries (cross-region-monitor, verify-archive --metrics). The API binary serves /metrics on its public listener and ignores this field. |
| `obs.log_level` | `string` | `info` | тАФ | Minimum log level тАФ debug / info / warn / error. |
| `obs.log_format` | `string` | `json` | тАФ | Log format тАФ json / console. |
| `obs.trace_exporter` | `string` | `none` | тАФ | OpenTelemetry trace exporter. Currently only 'none' is wired in this build; the 'otlp' value is reserved for the future tracing rollout and is rejected by Validate() until the exporter is implemented (so an operator setting it doesn't think tracing is on when it isn't). |
| `obs.trace_sample` | `float64` | `0.1` | тАФ | Trace sampling ratio тАФ 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (all). Read by the future tracing rollout; ignored in this build. |
